PowerShell($urls = @\("/", "/championships", "/drivers", "/tracks", "/records", "/login", "/championships/2025-cnsrc-s03", "/championships/2024-cnsrc-s02"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "$u $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("/", "/championships", "/drivers", "/tracks", "/records", "/login"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "$u $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("/", "/championships", "/drivers", "/tracks", "/records", "/login"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "$u $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content.Length\)b" } catch { "$u FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/championships" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $m = [regex]::Matches\($c, 'href="/championships/\([^"/]+\)"'\); $champId = $m[0].Groups[1].Value; $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/drivers" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $m2 = [regex]::Matches\($d, 'href="/drivers/\([^"/]+\)"'\); $driverId = $m2[0].Groups[1].Value; $t = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tracks" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $m3 = [regex]::Matches\($t, 'href="/tracks/\([^"/]+\)"'\); $trackId = $m3[0].Groups[1].Value; "ids: champ=$champId driver=$driverId track=$trackId"; $u = "/championships/$champId","/drivers/$driverId","/tracks/$trackId"; foreach \($p in $u\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "$p $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$p FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/drivers" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "fx-portrait on drivers index: " + \([regex]::Matches\($c, "fx-portrait"\).Count\); "fx-shine on drivers index \(should be 0 on cards\): " + \([regex]::Matches\($c, "fx-shine"\).Count\))

PowerShell($urls = @\("/", "/blog", "/admin/blog", "/api/admin/blog"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "$u $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "$u $\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { "$u FAIL $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/cnsrc-s03.json'\); console.log\('pointsTable:', JSON.stringify\(d.pointsTable, null, 2\)\); const r2 = d.rounds.find\(r => r.id === 'cnsrc-s03-r02'\); if\(r2\) { const s = r2.sessions.find\(s => s.subLabel === 'R2'\); if\(s\) { console.log\('R2 results:', JSON.stringify\(s.results.map\(r => \({pos:r.pos,driverId:r.driverId,pts:r.points,status:r.status}\)\), null, 2\)\); } }")
